analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet mocks Pompeo’s claim of US moral superiority and freedom, invoking George Floyd to portray US hypocrisy and lack of moral authority versus China. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) – Yes. The tweet portrays the US as hypocritical and lacking freedom/morality, undermining its moral superiority and implying Western immorality; China is mentioned as the comparison target of US claims. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – No. It does not praise China’s cooperative or benevolent actions. CH3 (China has an epic history) – No mention of history or resilience. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) – No explicit endorsement of China’s system or values; focus is on US hypocrisy. CH5 (CCP succeeds) – No claims about China’s development or success. CH6 (culture/nature) – Not applicable. Conclusion: Only CH1 is promoted.
